name: Malicious Named Pipe
notes: This rule triggers when a named pipe is created by known APT malware.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001837) PipeEvent (Pipe Connected), (5001836) PipeEvent (Pipe Created)

when the event matches LOWER("Pipe Full Full Name") in ('atctl', 'userpipe', 'iehelper', 'sdlrpc', 'comnap', 'isapi_http', 'isapi_dg', 'isapi_dg2', 'ahexec', 'winsession', 'lsassw', '46a676ab7f179e511e30dd2dc41bd388', '9f81f59bc58452127884ce513865ed20', 'e710f28d59aa529d6792ca6ff0ca1b34', 'rpchlp_3', 'NamePipe_MoreWindows', 'pcheap_reuse', 'msagent_*', 'gruntsvc') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Malicious Named Pipe on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001837) PipeEvent (Pipe Connected), (5001836) PipeEvent (Pipe Created)

AND when the event matches LOWER("Pipe Full Full Name") in ('atctl', 'userpipe', 'iehelper', 'sdlrpc', 'comnap', 'isapi_http', 'isapi_dg', 'isapi_dg2', 'ahexec', 'winsession', 'lsassw', '46a676ab7f179e511e30dd2dc41bd388', '9f81f59bc58452127884ce513865ed20', 'e710f28d59aa529d6792ca6ff0ca1b34', 'rpchlp_3', 'NamePipe_MoreWindows', 'pcheap_reuse', 'msagent_*', 'gruntsvc') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects when a named pipe is created by known APT malware.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
